name: Carrot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the grated carrots, brown sugar, and applesauce.
3. Add the oats, whole-wheat flour, bread flour, nonfat dried milk, and yeast to the carrot mixture. Mix until well combined.
4. Stir in the salt.
5. Pour in water and mix until the dough is moist but not watery.
6. Transfer the batter to a greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and slicing.
